intro: Cardio-only day, Base block. No lift. Easy + strides per §4.C W5 Fri.
Mon strides were skipped — today is this week's only stride dose; get them in.
Adj #9 still active: anchor effort to nasal-gate + §4.A pace + RPE, not the off-191 HR zones (zones skew low for run; true run MHR likely ≥195–200). Formal run-MHR retest still pending W6 Tue.

flags: Adj #9 — off-191 HR zones too low for run; anchor to nasal + pace + RPE
Mon strides skipped — 6×20 s flat strides today is the catch-up
FLAT strides only — hill strides are Mon-only per §2.A
No SI status reported AM 5/22 — flag any morning-after symptoms from Thu combined day before starting
cardio.workout: 25 min continuous Z1 easy + 6×20 s flat strides post-run (full walk/jog recovery between reps)

targets.pace: Easy 9:45–10:45/mi (§4.A Z1 band); strides ~mile-pace effort feel (~6:00–6:30/mi-ish, fast but smooth, NOT sprint)
targets.hr: Nasal-gated — don't chase a number (Adj #9). Off-191 Z1 cap ≤155 will read too low; trust nasal + RPE

cardio.warmup: First 5 min walk → ease into Z1 (built into the 25 min)
cardio.cooldown: 3–5 min walk + SI prehab — Tyler twists 3×15, reverse Tyler 3×15, McGill Big 3 5-3-1
cues: Nasal breathing held throughout easy block — drop pace if you have to mouth-breathe
Strides: relax shoulders, knees up, smooth turnover — accelerate over first 5 s, hold 10 s, float-down last 5 s; full walk/jog back between reps
Strides on flat ground only; abort any rep that feels jarring to right SI
If legs feel cooked from Thu, dial easy pace toward 10:45 not 9:45 — recovery aerobic is the point
